description: Style NoteThere's nothing a girl loves more than sparkling jewellery in all shapes and sizes. However, the bigger and shinier, the better! We bring to you jewellery from fabindia. Now take your pick and pair it up with fancy kurta's from Fabindia.Product DetailsSilver earring with orange stones and a tangerine centre stoneFish hook claspMaterial and CareSilverWipe with dry clothSize Length: 4 mm
